hero.title: Luca Fabbri
hero.subtitle: Tech Lead at Zucchetti Hospitality  ·  .NET  ·  Open Source  ·  class of '84

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Computer Engineer, born in 1984 in Rimini and now based in San Donà di Piave, Veneto. Graduated in 2010, I currently work as Tech Lead at Zucchetti Hospitality Srl, designing and building complex distributed software systems.
about.expertise: My focus: .NET, Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design, Cloud, Mobile & Embedded, real-time distributed systems.
about.xedotnet: Active member of XeDotNet, the Veneto .NET developer community.
about.blog_description: Written entirely in English — architectural decision records, technical deep-dives, and lessons from working as a Tech Lead.

seo.homeDescription: Tech Lead and .NET Engineer based in San Donà di Piave, Italy. Clean Architecture, DDD, Distributed Systems and Open Source. Author of BLite, EntglDb, Concordia.
seo.blogDescription: Articles on .NET, Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design, Distributed Systems and software engineering by Luca Fabbri, Tech Lead at Zucchetti Hospitality.

fun.title: Terminal Crawler
fun.desc: A tiny dungeon crawler in the spirit of retro terminal games. Use W A S D to move, fight off Null Pointers and Race Conditions, collect gold, descend 10 floors. Your progress is saved locally.
